title: Show 'My Tennis' summary on the admin player detail page
description: Surface the preference summary partial (WI-098) on the existing admin player detail page (/admin/league/players/{id}) so captains and admins can review a player's tennis profile in context.
acceptance_criteria: Admin player detail page embeds templates/admin/partials/my_tennis_summary.html in a clearly labelled 'My Tennis' section
Section shows the friendly 'Not filled in yet' state when the player has no stored preferences
Handler passes the composite preferences struct into the template context
Section positioned near existing identity details, before the teams/captaincy blocks

files_to_modify: internal/admin/players.go — load preferences on the detail handler
templates/admin/player_edit.html (or the canonical detail template) — include the partial

testing_requirements: Manual: admin navigates to a player with preferences and sees them rendered
Manual: admin navigates to a player with no preferences and sees the empty state

context.user_story: As a captain browsing the admin player list, I want to click into a player and immediately see their tennis profile alongside the rest of their record.
